error_missing_auth: Please connect your wallet and confirm your identity to open the treasure chest.
error_fetching_status: We couldn't check if you already have a treasure. Please try again.
error_claiming: Oops! The treasure chest couldn't be opened this time. Please try again.
error_signing: We couldn't confirm your signature for the claim. Shall we try again?
success: Congratulations! {amount} PAZ Gold Coins are now in your wallet.
error: There was a small issue processing your claim. Please give it another try.
already_claimed: You already have your treasure! The welcome chest can only be opened once.
not_eligible: It seems this treasure isn't for you, but other adventures await in the Club.
max_claims_reached: Mamma mia! All the welcome treasures have been claimed. That was fast!
invalid_signature: Your signature didn't match. Please make sure to confirm in your wallet and try again.
wallet_required: You need to connect your wallet to claim your treasure.
